lead: The LivingRoom at Summerhill Guest Estate
query: The LivingRoom at Summerhill Guest Estate Durban fine

kept.title: The LivingRoom at Summerhill Guest Estate Menu, Prices & 5☆
kept.verdict: Candlelit fine-dining tablescape with tasting plates and wine — plating style matches real_03; consistent with a rustic-elegant estate dining room. Kept as hero image.

kept.title: Summerhill Guest Estate | Home of the Livingroom
kept.verdict: Overhead plated dish, no branding conflicts; sourced directly from the official summerhillkzn.com domain. Kept.

kept.title: LivingRoom | Summerhill Guest Estate
kept.verdict: Chef harvesting chillies in front of the estate's colonial-style porch; sourced directly from the business. Kept.

kept.title: Summerhill Guest Estate - The night I finally experienced ..
kept.verdict: Fireside lounge interior from a travel blog post specifically about visiting Summerhill Guest Estate. Kept.

kept.title: Summerhill Guest Estate - The night I finally experienced ..
kept.verdict: Thatch-roof estate dining room in the evening, same blog post about Summerhill Guest Estate. Kept.

rejected.reason: Ultra-modern urban restaurant interior (orange pendant lighting, corduroy booths, terrazzo floor) inconsistent with the rustic colonial-estate architecture seen in the verified Summerhill photos (thatch roof, brick fireplace, white-balustrade porch). Likely a DineXp aggregator mis-attribution to a different restaurant. Rejected and deleted.

note: Vetted by build agent 2026-07-12. 5 of 6 kept, 1 rejected. Kept count >= 2 so stock fill was optional and skipped — real photos give good hero/gallery/experience coverage.
